/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/DSA_Visualizer.dir/modules/arsh/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSA_Visualizer.dir/modules/arsh/src/DSA/GraphAlgos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSA_Visualizer.dir/modules/arsh/src/DSA/SearchAlgos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSA_Visualizer.dir/modules/arsh/src/DSA/SortAlgos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSA_Visualizer.dir/modules/arsh/src/Visualizer/VisualizerEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSA_Visualizer.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSA_Visualizer.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSA_Visualizer.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSA_Visualizer.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSA_Visualizer.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSA_Visualizer.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSA_Visualizer.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o DSA_Visualizer  -lglfw -lGLEW -lGL -lm -ldl -lpthread
